headline: Oppenheimer Cuts ServiceNow (NOW) Price Target, Keeps Outperform Rating
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 10 Unrivaled Stocks of the Next 5 Years. On April 14, Oppenheimer reduced its price target on ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) from $175 to $130 and kept its Outperform rating on the stock. The firm cut its price target on the stock because of lower valuation multiples across the […]

headline: ComplianceCow Deal Puts ServiceNow AI Compliance Story In Focus
summary: ComplianceCow has integrated its continuous evidence collection tools with ServiceNow's AI platform. The partnership focuses on automated, ongoing governance for IT and cybersecurity controls within ServiceNow's GRC and IRM stack. The integration is designed to make enterprise audit trails more explainable and auditable while using generative AI. For investors watching ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW), this move sits at the intersection of IT service management, security operations, and governance,...

headline: The software rebound is real, but not every big name is back: Chart of the Day
summary: Software stocks just posted their best week in two and a half decades.

headline: Tech Divergence: Chips Soar, Software Weak - Will It Continue?
summary: Chip stocks like AMD and TSM soar while software giants ADBE and CRM lag due to AI threats and single-digit multiples. See why oversold software names could lead next.
